race.comment: ZOUSTROLOGY (12) got an overdue maiden victory out of the way over this course and distance last time out and will have taken some confidence from that win. Again gets the services of Thompson in the stirrups and is capable of going right on with the job now. NO NAME FRANK (2) resumes here but boasts a win over this course and distance and has won two of three when fresh. Found the right race to kick off the campaign. LUMENS LENNY (4) gets some weight off with the claim and should be able to sit up on speed. Will give backers a sight. MERCIAN (8) is a consistent conveyance who rarely puts in a poor one. Has to be included. GEEGEE JET BY (1) has put back-to-back wins together in lesser grade but shouldn't be discounted lightly.
